deploy.startCommand: echo '=== Starting ===' && ls -la dist-server/ && echo '=== Checking prisma ===' && ls node_modules/.prisma/client/ 2>&1 | head -5 && echo '=== Running prisma db push ===' && npx prisma db push --skip-generate 2>&1 && echo '=== Starting node ===' && node dist-server/index.js 2>&1
